class.name: PlayFabLobbyStateChange
class.description: The lobby snapshot is refreshed before this payload is emitted.

members.member: Affected member. Guaranteed non-null for successful [code]MEMBER_ADDED[/code] (the joining member), [code]MEMBER_REMOVED[/code] (the leaving member, resolved before the snapshot drops them), and [code]MEMBER_UPDATED[/code] (the member whose properties or connection status changed). Local-self member-property writes patch the local snapshot eagerly before this payload is emitted; remote member updates are populated from SDK change notifications. May be [code]null[/code] when [member result] is a failure (e.g. join/post-update operation completed with an error) and for kinds outside the member-scoped set.

Changed lobby properties. Populated for [code]PROPERTIES_UPDATED[/code] with the keys reported by the underlying [code]Updated[/code] state change — values are the post-update strings, or [Variant] [code]null[/code] when the key was cleared. Empty for other kinds.
